arguments.argument:
event_inherited() bCanTakeDamage=false; bCanDealDamage=false image_alpha=0 image_xscale=2; image_yscale=2 bActive=1
//Enemy base statistics eName="Decimator Armor" eLevel=36 maxLife=3200 life=maxLife pointWorth=40 atkPower=10 stunResist=50 resType[4]=5 affiliation=7 dieEffect=0
bShotReady=0 myProg=0 progTime=0 shotTime=110 shotDelay=195 shotDir=0 warnRad=0 checkHP=0 deathAnim=0
jeremyText="As the name states, it's a big piece of armor. While this is active, the Decimator is completely immune to damage. Oh yeah, watch out for those lasers." chaoText="That regeneration I mentioned from the laser pads is slower when the armor is active. Which is good because you can't deal any damage to counter that regeneration... Oh, check this out! Every time you destroy its attachments, the Decimator takes a lot of damage. Hmm, so all you gotta do is get through its attachment phases quickly and it should fall super fast. This attachment gains half resist to NORMAL attacks at 75%." devText="This boss is definitely set to be a fairly difficult one, as it's the barrier between this point and the final level. Lore wise, it's also CHAOS's most advanced bot at their disposal."
